exit_codes.0: no findings at selected fail threshold

recommended_commands.purpose: Summarize JUnit XML from a Godot test runner
Compare current scenario evidence against a baseline
recommended_commands.command: godot-scenario-report compare reports/baseline reports/current --format markdown --output reports/scenarios/compare.md
godot-scenario-report manifest coverage scenario-manifest.json --results reports/current --format html --output reports/scenarios/coverage.html
godot-scenario-report flake compare reports/run-1 reports/run-2 reports/run-3 --format markdown

recommended_commands.purpose: Bundle scenario evidence with reviewer links plus compact visual and log summaries
recommended_commands.command: godot-scenario-report bundle reports/scenarios --telemetry reports/runtime-timeline.json --visual reports/visual-smoke.json --evidence log=reports/run.log --format json --output reports/scenario-bundle.json
